name: Miguel Santos
resumeSummary: Backend engineer who led the sharding project that took Cloudbase's primary database past 10M rows without a rewrite.

notes.author: Diego Alvarez
notes.note: Strong system design round — walked through a sharding strategy that mapped closely to our billing service problem.

notes.author: Wei Chen
notes.note: Paired well during the technical exercise; asked good clarifying questions before diving in.

name: Jenna Park
resumeSummary: Eight years across fintech backend teams, most recently owning Vantiq's payments reconciliation service.

notes.author: Priya Natarajan
notes.note: One of the strongest platform candidates we've seen this year. Verbal offer extended pending comp approval.

name: Omar Farouk
resumeSummary: Mid-level engineer with solid Go experience but limited exposure to distributed systems at scale.

notes.author: Jasmine Cole
notes.note: Recruiter screen went well; a bit junior for the leveling but worth a technical screen.

name: Priya Shah
resumeSummary: Referred by Wei Chen; shipped Cloudbase's rate-limiting middleware now used across their entire API gateway.

notes.author: Diego Alvarez
notes.note: Offer accepted. Excellent onsite — particularly strong on the API design exercise.

name: Rachel Kim
resumeSummary: Ran the activation experimentation program at Loopscale that lifted trial conversion by 15 points in a year.

notes.author: Marcus Delacroix
notes.note: Sharp on experiment design; wants to see more product sense in the case study round.

name: Andre Bishop
resumeSummary: Early-career PM with one shipped feature area; resume is light on quantified outcomes.

name: Julia Marchetti
resumeSummary: President's Club three years running at Salesbridge, specializing in HR-tech enterprise deals.

notes.author: Camille Rousseau
notes.note: Offer accepted. Best discovery-call demo we ran all quarter — she pre-mapped the buying committee before the call.

name: Derek Voss
resumeSummary: Consistently hits quota at Northwind selling into mid-market operations teams; new to enterprise cycles.

notes.author: Camille Rousseau
notes.note: Good energy, needs to demonstrate he can navigate longer enterprise procurement cycles.

name: Fatima Al-Sayed
resumeSummary: Strong SDR metrics but no closing experience; not yet ready for a full-cycle enterprise role.

notes.author: Camille Rousseau
notes.note: Passing for now — encouraged her to apply again once she has closing experience.

name: Sasha Ivanova
resumeSummary: Led the workflow builder redesign at Formstack Labs; portfolio shows strong systems thinking for data-dense UI.

notes.author: Nadia Farouk
notes.note: Offer accepted. Portfolio review was the strongest we've seen this year for data-heavy interfaces.

name: Ben Okonkwo
resumeSummary: Strong visual craft, mostly marketing-site work rather than complex product workflows.

name: Grace Liu
resumeSummary: Managed a $2.1M book of business at Northbeam with a 94% renewal rate.

notes.author: Aisha Rahman
notes.note: Offer accepted. Handled the mock renewal call role-play better than any candidate we've seen this cycle.

name: Patrick O'Malley
resumeSummary: Support background with strong customer rapport; limited experience owning commercial renewal conversations.

notes.author: Aisha Rahman
notes.note: Great bedside manner, wants to see how he handles a pushback scenario in the next round.

name: Nour Khalil
resumeSummary: Support rep looking to move into a CSM track; limited account-management experience so far.

name: Marco Bellini
resumeSummary: Internal promote track from support into CSM; deep product knowledge of Helixware's platform from two years in the queue.

notes.author: Aisha Rahman
notes.note: Offer accepted. Impressed the panel with how methodically he triaged a mock at-risk account.

name: Vanessa Cruz
resumeSummary: Built the engineering interview loop from scratch at Hireloop; comfortable partnering directly with hiring managers.

notes.author: Simone Delacourt
notes.note: Strong profile — on hold pending Q3 headcount approval for this req.

name: Tobias Reinholt
resumeSummary: Coordinator looking to step into a full-cycle recruiting role; strong candidate-experience instincts.

name: Emeka Obi
resumeSummary: Set the event-driven architecture for Corebase's data platform, now processing 40B events per month.

notes.author: Hannah Kessler
notes.note: Exceptional architecture round — his event-bus experience maps directly onto our candidate-scoring roadmap.

name: Chloe Bennett
resumeSummary: Solid senior engineer background; would be a level-down from the staff scope of this role.

name: Hiroshi Yamada
resumeSummary: Capable generalist but lacks the systems-architecture depth this staff-level req requires.

notes.author: Hannah Kessler
notes.note: Good engineer, wrong level for this req — encouraged him to apply to the senior platform opening instead.

name: Isabella Conti
resumeSummary: Owns a $1.2M paid media budget at Marketrix with a documented 3.4x pipeline ROI.

notes.author: Talia Bergstrom
notes.note: Offer extended — her attribution modeling experience is exactly the gap on our team today.

name: Colin Baxter
resumeSummary: Solid all-around marketing manager; less specialized in paid demand gen than the role calls for.

notes.author: Talia Bergstrom
notes.note: Good generalist but Isabella is further ahead on the specific paid-media scope we need.

name: Meera Chandran
resumeSummary: Built the SaaS metrics dashboard used company-wide at Ledgerworks; strong modeling and communication skills.

notes.author: Beatrice Lindqvist
notes.note: Offer accepted. Excel modeling exercise was the cleanest we've seen — no formula errors, clear structure.

name: Dante Russo
resumeSummary: Top-quartile SDR at Outreach Labs with a 32% meeting-to-opportunity conversion rate.

notes.author: Elena Petrova
notes.note: Offer accepted. Roleplay was excellent — handled three objections in a row without losing rapport.

name: Keisha Brown
resumeSummary: Solid outbound track record; coachable and organized in her prospecting cadence.

notes.author: Elena Petrova
notes.note: Good energy in the phone screen, moving to a roleplay round.

name: Arjun Mehta
resumeSummary: No direct sales experience yet, but strong communication skills from a customer support background.

name: Lena Fischer
resumeSummary: Currently an SDR at Northwind; activity metrics are average relative to her team.

name: Samuel Osei
resumeSummary: Transitioning from retail into tech sales; enthusiastic but no transferable outbound experience yet.

notes.author: Elena Petrova
notes.note: Passing for now — worth reconsidering once he has some SDR ramp elsewhere.
